use_cases: Displaying animated notification feeds with staggered scroll effects
Creating engaging timeline or activity stream components
Building dynamic list views with formation and reset animations
Showcasing collections with perspective-based scrolling transformations
Implementing animated dashboards with scrolling data presentations
ai_summary: A Framer Motion-powered animated list component that transforms items into a vertical scrolling formation and back. Items scale and reposition dynamically using spring physics and timed transitions, creating an engaging scroll-down animation effect ideal for notification feeds, activity streams, or dynamic data presentations in modern web applications.
